props.name: heading
props.description: The application name displayed in the header.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls whether the side menu is expanded or collapsed.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: url
props.description: URL for the header link. Clicking the logo/heading navigates to this URL.

props.name: userName
props.description: User's name displayed in the profile section.

props.name: userSecondaryText
props.description: Secondary text displayed below the user's name, such as role or email.

events.name: onNavigate
events.description: Callback fired when a menu item is navigated, providing the target URL path.

events.name: onToggle
events.description: Callback fired when the side menu is toggled open or closed.

slots.name: accountContent
slots.description: Content rendered in the account/profile slot.

slots.name: primaryContent
slots.description: Content rendered in the primary navigation slot.

slots.name: secondaryContent
slots.description: Content rendered in the secondary navigation slot.

props.name: userSecondaryText
props.description: Secondary text displayed below the user's name, such as role or email.

events.name: onNavigate
events.description: Emits when a navigation link is clicked. Emits the URL as a string.

events.name: onToggle
events.description: Emits when the side menu is toggled open or closed.

slots.description: Content rendered in the account/profile slot.

slots.name: primaryContent
slots.description: Content rendered in the primary navigation slot.

slots.name: secondaryContent
